annotations.annotation: Adopted by the Legislature of the Menominee Indian Tribe 7-19-1979 by Ord. No. 79-12. Amendments noted where applicable

section.heading: Plan reaffirmed.
section.text: Pursuant to Article XII, Section 1, of the Constitution of the Menominee Indian Tribe and pursuant to Paragraph 14d of the Management Plan of Menominee Enterprises, a Tribal Enterprise of the Menominee Indian Tribe of Wisconsin (hereinafter referred to as "Menominee Enterprises Plan"), the Menominee Enterprises Plan is hereby reaffirmed.1

footnote.text: Editor's Note: The Menominee Enterprises Plan, as amended 9-7-1979 by Ord. No. 79-17 and 4-24-1993 by Ord. No. 93-5, and as it may be subsequently amended, is on file at the office of the Tribal Chairperson.
